message:
chore(beads): sync beads issues.jsonl

Single-line update to .beads/issues.jsonl reflecting routine bead state
changes emitted by br sync. No code or semantics changes; just keeping
the canonical JSONL store in lockstep with the local SQLite DB so other
agents pulling this repo see the same issue graph.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
